author: mariyaafrin
title: SLC29-W5 | Fast Food Recipe : Chicken Jhalmuri Recipe.
text:
**Hello..!! My Dear Friends, I am @mariyaafrin from #Bangladesh 🇧🇩**
***
Hello my dear steemit friends. How are you all? I hope everyone is well by the grace of Allah. Alhamdulillah, I am also well with your prayers and love. I am here with a new post again, welcome to my new post, I hope you will like my post. Today I am here to participate in Steemit Learning Challenge Session 29 Week 5.The theme of the fifth week's engagement challenge is making ***chicken jhalmuri***.I am very happy to be participating in the fifth week.Thank you to @selina1 ma'am for coming up with such a great fast food recipe .Below is a step-by-step recipe for making chicken jhalmuri as per my dear mam's instructions. so let's start........
|![1_20260213_201548_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdGJojiE3vWnq8okQnqFmWT5JKcC6APcSgeUiSNTggfxd/1_20260213_201548_0000.png) |-|
Photo Designed by Canva
https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfAkUqGw5uy1jNmTcb68ECgENHtdXjHrr83YSaNXr9hjW/17303825412526700774889818796594.png |
***✅ 1. Make the recipe mentioned above and describe the detailed method with pictures.***
| |-| ***The ingredients used to make Chicken Jhal Muri are included below:*** |
Making ingredients:
| |-| |![IMG_20260213_180807.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXRvz3iVusQmCsqmFjTKTYL3JPmMBFZeLCHtYYyKK93GZ/IMG_20260213_180807.jpg) |-| https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfAkUqGw5uy1jNmTcb68ECgENHtdXjHrr83YSaNXr9hjW/17303825412526700774889818796594.png |
Ingredients
|
Quantity
|----|---- |
chicken meat
|
half cup
|
muri
|
3 cup
|
Boiled chickpeas
|
1 cup
|
Boiled potatoes
|
1 piece
|
Dried chili, cumin and garlic paste
|
1 tablespoons
|
Onion
|
two
|
Coriander leaves
|
As needed
|
Turmeric powder
|
1 tablespoons
|
Salt
|
1 tablespoons (to taste)
|
Garam masala powder
|
1Teaspoon
|
Green chili
|
three
|
Tomato
|
One
|
Soybean oil
|
4-5 tablespoons
|
Carrot
|
one
|
Cucumber
|
One
***Here is a step-by-step guide to making Chicken Jhal Muri using the above ingredients:*** |
Making process:
| |-| *** **
  • Step 01
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_182513.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmX1ADpKCibWB4USnYptrNCmrkBXdvuxVHrNqrCautV5b9/IMG_20260213_182513.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_182449.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPmM2wggv2fXeQT23sdokP9T6CAQQvHMi9LLowqfqx8Li/IMG_20260213_182449.jpg) -|- |![IMG_20260213_182434.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQKkkB9BjLa7hq4qVoSkZPSbbzKajTYec9EY9i2Q55CQn/IMG_20260213_182434.jpg) |-|
    - First, I boiled the potatoes and mashed them well with my hands.Then I cut the chicken into small pieces and washed it with clean water.Then I chopped the whole ingredients like coriander leaves, tomatoes, green chilies, cucumbers, and carrots.
    *** **
  • Step 02
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_183253.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWMpQsicpRRuYn3Ae7gBYFkpwQo4ePb5Frt1zUh5Muz3r/IMG_20260213_183253.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_183302.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYtQYfcipovtJ3W9APYDbh9MyB61VKk2VGSrK7Y8yWen1/IMG_20260213_183302.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_183323.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmSTUkEPLn2TzaREUPMzhXErQYuSrgLkNKQ15Tza2MDA4B/IMG_20260213_183323.jpg) -|-|- ![IMG_20260213_183808.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdnpAkoG2S9oiMmsUjLnRJoSGi7VEpwZfJHGxsoCBiJKc/IMG_20260213_183808.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_183913.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQhn3uEZ4ggDMpZKcNEv7pMxkBmDv4dpxtX1wRurhDcHt/IMG_20260213_183913.jpg) -|-
    - Then I put a pan on the stove and added 2 tablespoons of soybean oil. When the oil got a little hot, I put the pre-cut and cleaned chicken pieces in it.I fried the chicken pieces well for some time with a little turmeric and salt.When the color of the chicken pieces turned light brown, I removed them from the stove and placed them in a bowl.
    *** **
  • Step 03
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_184031.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeQ4vPxwZc4oTgzgsawUYYbrcj58VX8X2haiW6nWsBv8m/IMG_20260213_184031.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_184038.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRjCYWJ3w83GpeN2YPUZnHF7iT1cBFDsGZT1rmns5Ub4K/IMG_20260213_184038.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_184142.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPE23qh9YscxveJ5K6q49q52U5Hk9XjQVBpjMC5o3bLgU/IMG_20260213_184142.jpg) -|-|- ![IMG_20260213_184415.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQ9CqF1hhZwKXwCtUAVskx26K3JL4449HeEVVCegfbo7v/IMG_20260213_184415.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_184517.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNRVToyKk36D6MASzh3wXL8Knjv2EopPXrLiqSXEPpgVn/IMG_20260213_184517.jpg) -|-
    - Then I put a pan on the stove and added 4 to 5 tablespoons of soybean oil. When the oil got a little hot, I added the chopped onion and fried the chopped onion until it was lightly browned.When the onion turns light brown, I add cumin seeds, dried chilies, garlic, turmeric powder, a little salt, and garam masala and fry them well.Once the spices were well ground, I added the pre-boiled chickpeas and potatoes and mixed them well with the spices and stirred.
    *** **
  • Step 04
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_184523.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWaFmWkY691h9Zo44d1BybjMkeVACZVLhR8rnsgicaiAZ/IMG_20260213_184523.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_185058.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXGi8w4JcD47o297aiKYRk4RNirEqL2mhZVD99DFevBbq/IMG_20260213_185058.jpg) -|- ![IMG_20260213_185259.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmf9HTPHoSKNxGXWTfvusdKQxPPYS12yfmBJxsPEJ1dqcD/IMG_20260213_185259.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_185644.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQuYcuLa9hZgTR6v33bHDgbyfs3SGzMK9zw9NPyXKEGQJ/IMG_20260213_185644.jpg) -|-
    - After mixing it well with the spices, I added a little water and cooked the chickpeas well with the water.Once the chickpeas were well cooked with the spices, I Spread the coriander leaves from the top and then when it was finally cooked, I removed it from the stove.
    *** **
  • Step 05
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_190128.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZZ3r5DpBpameZZdHFKbrF7PRg9L7LjsnK7TecY1grBVN/IMG_20260213_190128.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_190139.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmcGC5niPtN1eW6McnQRvjPu2wfR1gTBStjX6oCoZYAGdP/IMG_20260213_190139.jpg) -|- |![IMG_20260213_190305.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeASX6vXi3cEFPsS66y2WGQbMSDHhqnQa4TMgtZhURhwp/IMG_20260213_190305.jpg) |-|
    - First, I took a bowl to make the spicy muri. Then, I put a good amount of chopped onion, chopped green chili, a little salt, and a little mustard oil in it and mixed it well.Then I added chopped coriander leaves, chopped cucumber, and chopped tomato one by one.
    *** **
  • Step 06
    • ** *** ![IMG_20260213_190422.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYAu5xDSWWYpC83U6FrTCB6XAeVyxKJeXtkon79XWMAr4/IMG_20260213_190422.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_190432.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWWcGZnJapkBogcz6VQijG7qS7JsTZFwJ5DexW2GS5wjg/IMG_20260213_190432.jpg)|![IMG_20260213_190439.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQvH8QNJrjjKVjW5R4MAmwXr756uoi32SfXN4A4KCHoPX/IMG_20260213_190439.jpg) -|-|- |![IMG_20260213_215855.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPJScWQPVZCk1QGW41aqZFyXPUpevEP44X9bbzCR3Whjb/IMG_20260213_215855.jpg) |-|
    - Then I put the muri inside it and then I put the chickpeas and finally I put the fried chicken and mix all the ingredients well with the muri and finally I made delicious chicken jhal muri.
    |
    ***✅ 2.Who in your family would you like to share the recipe with?***
    | |-|
    ***First of all, I want to share this delicious chicken jhalmuri with every member of my family.Because whenever we, as a family, get together, a different kind of festive atmosphere is created, and in this festive atmosphere, this chicken jhalmuri will add even more to the conversation.Even then, I especially want to share this muri makha with my younger sister, one of my family members.Because she loves chicken jhal muri so much, I especially want to share this chicken jhal muri with my younger sister.Because this chicken jhal muri was so delicious, I especially want to share this unique jhal muri with him.***
     |
    ***✅ 3. You are having trouble finding an ingredient for a recipe.Create a price list of recipe ingredients (prices in your local currency and in steem).***
    | |-|
    ***I had no trouble finding the ingredients used in today's chicken jhalmuri because these ingredients are usually available in every cook's kitchen.Similarly, I had the ingredients used in today's Chicken Jhal Muri in my kitchen, so I was able to make this recipe very easily.And this recipe is very easy to make, so I didn't face any obstacles in making this recipe either.***
    ***The steam price and local price of the ingredients used to make today's Chicken Jhal Muri are given below:***

    ***✅ 4. Present the recipe in an attractive presentation using your username,recipe name and date written on a piece of paper.***
    | |-| |
    Final presentation:
    | |-| |![IMG_20260213_192036.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmd62fRhiVCoXW6Ju9Ba9KZ9tqMum7piizb48goHbNdZ5Q/IMG_20260213_192036.jpg) |-| |![IMG_20260213_192036.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmd62fRhiVCoXW6Ju9Ba9KZ9tqMum7piizb48goHbNdZ5Q/IMG_20260213_192036.jpg) |-| |![IMG_20260213_191937.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmP95AHr6MtBFsz5iNLYES8GD4UBj2gTiTx5ANKvVktC9f/IMG_20260213_191937.jpg) |-| ***Finally I put a note with the username and creation date to present it in a final way and presented it beautifully from different angles.*** ![IMG_20260213_192338.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTFXoRzvPSeLtwnZ2UUsEXJsJJkFAvLMSaeMob8UVzVFg/IMG_20260213_192338.jpg)|Selfie with my recipe -|- >>I hope everyone likes my today's recipe for making chicken jhalmuri and let me know how you all liked it in the comments.See you in a new post.Until then, everyone, stay well, stay healthy, and stay safe. |

author: karobiamin71
title: Daily Menu Delicacies Week No. 110 date (14-02-2026) // The name of your choice, (Try to be brief, we don't want very long texts).
text:
![IMG_20260211_090449.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbGBQGBbEW8iZ5MQBZphmxE9PCs3kAjUXU1jXrG82Z5Wv/IMG_20260211_090449.jpg)

I start by thanking @steemit-ironchef.

Today I spent my day like every day. However, I had a very nice day with my family, spending time with my son and daughter.

I woke up in the morning and made breakfast like every day. Today I had noodles for breakfast and I had a lot of fun with my son and daughter.

![IMG_20260212_111014.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmde7C6HgouXnYaspf7KvhZTqH44Wu3k8FaJ9soEriV4aW/IMG_20260212_111014.jpg)

After that, I was busy with some household chores, I put dried chili and turmeric powder in the sun, besides that, I dried these big beans in the sun today. I will dry and store these big beans in the sun. It is very fun to eat dried big beans. They looked quite salty to look at.

![IMG_20260210_191811.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUgkAX1ybJSN6CTevWBMQE5VwP3dcaNrr2DfA6TaGYRUw/IMG_20260210_191811.jpg)

After that, I helped my mother-in-law in the lunch cooking. Today, I cooked desi chicken broth. My sister-in-law gifted us the desi chicken. After a long time, the combination of hot rice with desi chicken broth was very good for lunch.

Then I bathed the boys and girls and myself and we all had lunch together. After resting for a while, I was walking outside with my son and daughter. Today I went to our pond after a long time.

![IMG_20260212_164155.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRqbDDgLKnZbDoKYj8Kga1WP6ep7Rfmgp13L39MZcXEXK/IMG_20260212_164155.jpg)

I spent the afternoon incredibly beautifully. I took some very beautiful photographs with my son and daughter in the afternoon and these are the main assets or savings of my life. Seeing their smiling faces, all my fatigue goes away. I felt very good to spend such a beautiful moment.

![IMG_20260213_174241.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmauK2er9LSyAEJizQTudLkCfeqD5btRQn12EmfuLwwrpU/IMG_20260213_174241.jpg)

Then in the evening I made chicken fries for everyone. I made today's chicken fries because my daughter had a promise. Everything was in the fridge in advance, so I cooked it quickly. However, the chicken fries were so much fun to eat and it was very tasty.

In the evening, we all had a very nice time eating chicken fries while talking together. Like every day, I spent my day very beautifully. Please let me know how you liked it.

I am inviting my friends.

author: ruthyjah12
title: Late Night Cravings: Listening Gently to Your Body at Night
text: [![IMG-20260213-WA0002.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/j5LW6pkh/IMG-20260213-WA0002.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/cgG40bWK) Hello fam. Trust your all doing well and strong,I want to share a little reminder about the food we eat and when we are to eat them. Please be reminded and have peace Most people tend to eat food and sleep free minutes after. In some homes, they eat late at night or probably, one may crave a particular meal at midnight just to fill his squeezing stomach. In English, it's called **Dinner**. Dinner is not meant to be ate late at night like in the times of 9-11pm. There is something comforting about the quiet of the night—the world slows down, the lights grow softer, and sometimes, our cravings grow louder. Late-night eating can feel soothing after a long day, almost like a small reward we give ourselves. Yet, while it may feel satisfying in the moment, our bodies often whisper a different story. Eating late at night can quietly disturb your natural rhythm. Our bodies are designed to rest and repair during sleep, not to digest heavy meals. When we eat too close to bedtime, it may lead to poor digestion, bloating, or discomfort. Some people experience heartburn or acid reflux because lying down makes it easier for stomach acid to rise. Late meals can also affect sleep quality. Instead of drifting peacefully into deep rest, the body remains active, working to process food. This may cause restlessness or lighter sleep, leaving you tired the next morning. Over time, consistent late-night eating may contribute to unwanted weight gain, especially if the meals are high in sugar or unhealthy fats. At night, metabolism slows down, and excess calories are more likely to be stored rather than used for energy. There is also the emotional side. Late-night eating is often connected to stress, boredom, or emotional comfort rather than true hunger. When food becomes a response to feelings instead of nourishment, it may create an unhealthy cycle that is hard to break. So, when is the best time to eat? Gently, the body thrives on balance. It is advisable to have your last full meal at least 2–3 hours before bedtime. This gives your body enough time to digest properly before you lie down to sleep. For many people, finishing dinner between 6:00 pm and 8:00 pm works beautifully, depending on their schedule. If hunger truly comes late at night, choose something light and nourishing—perhaps a small portion of fruit, yogurt, or a handful of nuts. Listen carefully: are you truly hungry, or simply tired or emotional? Sometimes a glass of warm water or herbal tea can calm the craving. Your body is precious. Treat it with softness and awareness. By choosing mindful eating times, you allow your body to rest deeply, wake refreshed, and glow from within. 🌸 ❤️ Y'all from my end.

author: tammanna
title: SLC29-W5 | Fast Food Recipe : Chicken Jhalmuri Recipe
text:
"Bismillahir Rahmanir Raheem"
| ---|
**Assalamualaikum Everyone. This is @tammanna from #Bangladesh.**
![f352f9cd-c2ce-4aba-96a6-f469b5221c79.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVzv1QN4ASLSky3G14H6dneMGeDg8zuQPeAKdHHc7Qg1r/f352f9cd-c2ce-4aba-96a6-f469b5221c79.jpg) How are you guys? I hope you are all doing well, and my day is going well, too. Alhamdulillah, today I am here with a great and delicious recipe. I am really happy to be participating in this contest, and I would like to thank everyone for giving us the opportunity to make such a beautiful recipe. Let's get started without further delay. >>✅ 1. Make the recipe mentioned above and describe the detailed method with pictures. |Required materials 👇🏾 | | :-- | |Ingredients| Quantity| |--|--| Chicken| 2 pis chickpeas |3 cup Chilli |1/2 tablespoon Muri |1 cup Cucumber| 1 piece Masala |1 tablespoon Chopped green chilies |1 tablespoon Mustard oil |1 tablespoon chopped Onion| 1 table spoon Tarmaric |1/2 tablespoon salt|1 table spoon Carrot ,Tomato|1 pis ##
The Process of receipe
--- **🟫 Step 01** 🥣First, I soak the chickpeas overnight, then I cook them well in a pressure cooker. 🥣Then I will put a clean frying pan on oven , and I will put the chicken pieces cut into small pieces in there.
![23a36785-043a-45c9-8a91-d513b7f78246.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNuxmcPjyMQbkfzDJcbsJGLsKuLDsdyZzJDYZFYr3NoyL/23a36785-043a-45c9-8a91-d513b7f78246.jpg)| |-|
![336111f1-bec2-449c-a898-09b53140d9f7.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNUizXxteFVNx1YdCpjMkgXy66ww1tg9JMoMjQFPcwnKf/336111f1-bec2-449c-a898-09b53140d9f7.jpg)| |-|
**🟫 Step 02** 🥣I will fry the chicken well with oil and salt. Then, when it is fried, I will take it out on a plate, and in the same frying pan, I will add chopped onion and chopped green chili. 🥣Here I have chopped tomatoes, carrots, cucumbers, onions, and green chillies into small pieces. 🥣Then I'll fry everything in oil here until it's nicely browned. 🥣Once the onions are fried, I will add the boiled chickpeas here.
![110bea00-8c66-4d04-a53d-823388673432.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQYb9rRwgnWAuZLXmxv6rL2fSwcnkwxRMgU1sUXDVvhdp/110bea00-8c66-4d04-a53d-823388673432.jpg)| |-|
![667b988d-7257-41c0-9175-abf24c52fc87.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbvTejnJCLhW9am7GXbvdHcLHu16DLy6EkuH6AR3BrKmJ/667b988d-7257-41c0-9175-abf24c52fc87.jpg)| |-|
![c96645c5-8bae-4266-a0a2-46c4cfc3281a.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeB4xK48DHXfeJhiUSXZ3RXHVX7cpV1GxTtPhCy4M7tjG/c96645c5-8bae-4266-a0a2-46c4cfc3281a.jpg)| |-|
![834f31d3-f110-4b3a-8756-9c24a2d48fbb.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmahjyHWzFHckCxiTA7uqCmEWx7HasA6upvRMMe8gGpyZN/834f31d3-f110-4b3a-8756-9c24a2d48fbb.jpg)| |-|
**🟫 Step 03** 🥣Then I'll give the fried chicken. 🥣Then, I will fry the chickpeas as well with all the powdered spices. 🥣My work in the first phase is complete, then in the second phase, I will take a clean bowl and put the required amount of muri in it. 🥣Then I will give a quantity of prepared chickpeas here.
![75bdac44-f322-4900-a450-536da8cc30f5.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbvRrpkXxPtJ8JTmDSvNJ3P1yxdxMZazWWftyTCaNWQcz/75bdac44-f322-4900-a450-536da8cc30f5.jpg)| |-|
![2ec6d311-78c5-4e0f-b054-3ffefbda3147.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmaBTS9wuh58cTq5ZaFfaeQWDGHHMhuD7eF1UkutixzovQ/2ec6d311-78c5-4e0f-b054-3ffefbda3147.jpg)| |-|
![24d21da7-9714-457d-ad49-afc543ffd7ef.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYVemnobvKqACgkAfFBf3WJA5RgpvUVMTWMk8x6zLgNYR/24d21da7-9714-457d-ad49-afc543ffd7ef.jpg)| |-|
![2bd94996-95c7-4bc4-a7be-99741eac45eb.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfHkvCQZKy4yotrJeYHDRz9n2QArYjJy2xH9JBmqLpscp/2bd94996-95c7-4bc4-a7be-99741eac45eb.jpg)| |-|
**🟫 Step 04** 🥣Then I will add all the chopped vegetables here. 🥣Then I'll add soybean oil and salt to taste.
![f4a30adc-26da-4e53-b0b0-9a52e3f2fd41.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmScuNVXz52VjKU43uJVuPuA6xxMxTf6u5Aji143Bf5rj8/f4a30adc-26da-4e53-b0b0-9a52e3f2fd41.jpg)| |-|
![8ee198ff-0bab-4db9-b172-47528b9a9474.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNxUTPdyvPccM7wfWit454Hj3qi5ZMxs7ZPZHBZJgNcEF/8ee198ff-0bab-4db9-b172-47528b9a9474.jpg)| |-|
**🟫 Step 05** 🥣Then mix everything well, and my quick, delicious, and tasty muri makha will be ready. ![f352f9cd-c2ce-4aba-96a6-f469b5221c79.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVzv1QN4ASLSky3G14H6dneMGeDg8zuQPeAKdHHc7Qg1r/f352f9cd-c2ce-4aba-96a6-f469b5221c79.jpg) >>✅ 2. Who in your family would you like to share the recipe with? I want to share this recipe with the whole family, but first of all, I want to give this recipe to my son because he loves to eat muri makha, and such recipes are in his list of favorites, so I will make this dish for him first, which is very tasty and fun. This dish, made in a new style, is just for him. >>✅ 3. You are having trouble finding an ingredient for a recipe. Create a price list of recipe ingredients (prices in your local currency and in steem). I had no trouble finding the ingredients I needed to make today's recipe. Basically, I completed my recipe today with the ingredients I had in the kitchen. I didn't need many ingredients to make such a beautiful, unique, and delicious recipe. However, I am mentioning the prices of all the ingredients needed to prepare my recipe below. |Product |BDT Price| Steem Price| |--|--|--| chicken|50 tk| 8.03 Onion| 10 tk| 1.60 chickpeas| 50 tk| 8.03 Chilli power| 5 tk| 0.80 muri| 20 tk| 3.21 cucumber |5 tk| 0.80 tarmaric |2 tk| 0.32 oil |20 tk |3.21 masala |30 tk| 4.82 salt| 5 tk|0.80 Carrot Tomato|12 tk|1.92 Total|209 tk|33.58 [IPFS VIDEO](https://gateway.pinata.cloud/ipfs/bafybeihvtzqx7lpiuh5crc77be6en4ex4czwmplrslv6j4hee5qo5hl524) >>✅ 4. Present the recipe in an attractive presentation using your username, recipe name, and date written on a piece of paper.  I took a picture of my username tag along with the recipe I prepared today, and it is presented below. |
𝒇𝒊𝒏𝒂𝒍𝒆 𝒐𝒖𝒕𝒑𝒖𝒕
| |-| ![57bea0a1-14bb-429f-84eb-802d828cd27e.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVzazUixtktA6wk5opp1g5yBR5crJtaktA8ZHk9D43jvh/57bea0a1-14bb-429f-84eb-802d828cd27e.jpg) ##
My selfie with the receipe
--- ![5637e91d-3396-43d4-9c24-5b7a4d1ea63f.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmSV1J2QyVZmGWaZrGYrtcfWKDfX4DT8UZnuRJZnHAj94R/5637e91d-3396-43d4-9c24-5b7a4d1ea63f.jpg)
![C3TZR1g81UNaPs7vzNXHueW5ZM76DSHWEY7onmfLxcK2iPJL81FSnaUvBWcD5iZTFpjf9ezxs3kiupVWRKF61XuqhasvCtC1JRTK9P6Sz7YNnUaWYABNiuL.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRDGakkjKoaVympAAufuzPBV4RV5JAPaBNHW5UvyKR6qr/C3TZR1g81UNaPs7vzNXHueW5ZM76DSHWEY7onmfLxcK2iPJL81FSnaUvBWcD5iZTFpjf9ezxs3kiupVWRKF61XuqhasvCtC1JRTK9P6Sz7YNnUaWYABNiuL.png)

author: sadaf02
title: SLC29-W5 // "Boiled Chicken Recipes"
text:
## ***بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ  الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِیْمِ*** ![IMG_20260210_195536_434.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmao13TP3McEr56PyzdmSuFrXBGkmQ9RWQKvdduybmYjnC/IMG_20260210_195536_434.jpg) ***Cover Photo***
***༻꧂Good  Evening Steemians ༻꧂***
##
***Assalam-O-Alaikum!***
***Warm welcome to all my dear Steemians. I hope you are all doing well. I hope you have a wonderful day. Today I am excited to participate in the food challenge organized by @suboohi ma’am. I am truly grateful to her for giving me the opportunity to share my homemade recipes and. May Allah grant success, good health and happiness to all the admins and members of the Recreational steem. Lets guys continue supporting and inspiring one another.*** ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***༻꧂Have you tried boiled chicken recipes?? What recipe does your family like? ༻꧂***
| |-| Yes I have tried boiled chicken recipes many times guys. I really enjoy making it at home. The boiled chicken is simple. It is healthy and versatile. So I often use it in different dishes like soups, salads and even stir fries. My family really loves these types of recipes especially my elder brother and my mother. They have a special liking for flavorful dishes such as Shami Chicken, Tikka Kabab and Beef Kabab. They also like chicken curry. Whenever I prepare these dishes. They always appreciate the effort and enjoy every bite. I try to cook them with the perfect balance of spices and aroma. It makes the food even more delicious and satisfying. Cooking for my family gives me immense joy. Then seeing them happy with the food motivates me to keep experimenting in the kitchen. It is truly rewarding to share homemade meals with the people I love. ![IMG_20260210_195714_999.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWgcoEoAExhqVJXqDZ4kcopNeMvaSJTvSUMVU4Kjxj4QM/IMG_20260210_195714_999.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***༻꧂Make the chicken recipe that is shared in the course / or any one with boiled chicken that you like.with a detailed step-by-step procedure along with images.꧂***
| |-| ## ***The Ingredients Which I Used For This*** : |Sr| Ingredients | |--|--| |1| Chicken Half Kg | | 2| Flour As Needed| |3| Peas boiled One Cup | |4| Carrot grated One Medium | |5| Onion chopped One Medium | | 6 | Boiled Potatoes Two Medium| |7| Coriander Powder One Tablespoon | |8 | Cumin Powder One Tablespoon | |9| Garam Masala One Tablespoon| |10| Green Coriander Leaves | |11 | Bread Crumbs | |12| Salt As Taste| |13| Red Chilli Flakes Two Tablespoon | |14| Red Chilli Powder One Tablespoon| |15| Chopped Green Chillies|  |16| Egg | ![IMG_20260210_174222_912.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVCMPPCi8Lu8fdyYbENhK8FYYeUburtnY9bvbFsHnwiHp/IMG_20260210_174222_912.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) ## ***Procedure :*** |
***Step 1:***
| |-| To make the recipe I first prepared all the ingredients. I boiled the peas, boiled the potatoes and grated the carrots. After preparing these I boiled the chicken as well. When all the ingredients were ready. I placed the chicken in a large bowl. I shredded it. So that I could make the chicken and vegetables Kabab paste. This way everything was organized and ready guys. I could easily move on to the next step of making the kababs dear steemians. ![IMG_20260210_182029_691.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXzK3b8B2hYSDoPRQUMhPrZs7aY9YjvMa3HBzjsPKr1xw/IMG_20260210_182029_691.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 2:***
| |-| Then I added all the vegetables guys. I added chopped onions, boiled potatoes, peas and the grated carrots. Everything was mixed in a large bowl. I knew it was going to turn out absolutely delicious. I had made it before. Its taste is always amazing. It is full of flavor. I was very excited to see how it would turn out this time dear steemians. ![IMG_20260210_182633_455.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbV638e27iWzge9ED7AWD2z6eMnj7dJC7x4gZGiXPMREv/IMG_20260210_182633_455.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 3:***
| |-| So then guys I added all the spices to in it. I had already mentioned the quantity of each spice. Of course, everyone can adjust it according to their own taste. I wanted to make the kababs a little spicy this time. So I also added red chili flakes and green chilies on top. With all these ingredients. I knew this recipe was going to turn out extremely delicious and flavorful. ![IMG_20260210_183413_635.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeEWaDF8jQnkT8MWE8PeSJPgGCF4JXpuVkCxh1HksSDYc/IMG_20260210_183413_635.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 4:***
| |-| Then I mixed all the ingredients. I tried mixing it a little with a masher. It did not mashed properly. So guys I used my hands to mix everything. I managed to make a smooth and well combined paste guys. This paste was perfect. It would help the kababs hold their shape beautifully. ![IMG_20260210_184835_882.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWi8Sk19ZqzswgauHCDqu5cTPgUXreTfQXDPRr7C7iJKs/IMG_20260210_184835_882.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 5:***
| |-| Then I mixed the paste thoroughly. After that I started shaping the paste into round kababs. This is such a fun and enjoyable step. Well guys making the kababs round is a little tricky. I smiled while doing it all by myself. It really made the cooking process even more enjoyable and entertaining. ![IMG_20260210_190721_000.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXzYSMJBQ1Jbvz9DeqDcJbi23Xj8NWeS7qRUsoZkKmAGF/IMG_20260210_190721_000.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 6:***
| |-| Then I started the coating. I dipped each pattie in flour. After that I dipped it in beaten egg. When it is fully coated with the egg. I rolled it in the breadcrumbs. This way the patties got a perfect. The even coating and is ready for frying. ![IMG_20260210_191507_171.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmayQYSTAse4pmKgAiAkdJxu9FEWpV9L7PEfcxshAEacrs/IMG_20260210_191507_171.jpg)
|![IMG_20260210_192146_104.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXSFrA8SukxwxrLREQKTFweJbdvpo1mGo5zWu8vVqxbnB/IMG_20260210_192146_104.jpg) | | - |
|![IMG_20260210_192117_164.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXdQaXRprTxJqX11TEksrusHY14WdLGexcmCPY2Gq2xmK/IMG_20260210_192117_164.jpg) | | - |
![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |
***Step 7:***
| |-| I had already added ghee to the pan. I kept it on the stove to heat. So after finishing the coating of all the patties. I carefully placed them in the hot ghee. I fried it thoroughly on both sides. I fried until it is golden and perfectly cooked.
| ![IMG_20260210_192214_899.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTuUTnSN9qmZ52tKYJKnksAgFyJ4hNuowC4jggh7Rq9GJ/IMG_20260210_192214_899.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260210_194804_087.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdBRfQ7dgA5fdaMx7M3AoFpCWARLbWQ29pzBSTejoMNcG/IMG_20260210_194804_087.jpg) | | - |
## ***Finally I plated the kababs. It is ready to serve. The golden, crispy and full of flavor. This making it a treat for both the eyes and the taste buds.*** ![IMG_20260210_195740_492.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmecQJH5vSvA51HbEkf5v9W37Wne4MPdshSG6V3XQkdwrE/IMG_20260210_195740_492.jpg) ![IMG_20260210_195640_283.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQ1oo1VgPnhVwwquVBCfKd15PWkTCLQWcuazyq6kXiKbr/IMG_20260210_195640_283.jpg) ![IMG_20260210_195631_539.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQma2AdQekzZjioFCvJ2TFnq1BPUYeSUfrDyuWduVXMAYLj/IMG_20260210_195631_539.jpg) ![IMG_20260210_195536_434.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmao13TP3McEr56PyzdmSuFrXBGkmQ9RWQKvdduybmYjnC/IMG_20260210_195536_434.jpg) ![20250813_131545_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYXZTRVmzRwQLqaqnHSJGHSNwASab2GmuhKCQ5hXXenio/20250813_131545_0000.png) |

author: ngoenyi
title: week #12 begins And Week #11 Winners 🏆🏆🏆 announcement Of the Delicious 😋 Food Highlights
text:
![1000876634.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWPyvJiQqAkXecB7v9Rs1EeoRsdzkUUwsALxk9B26pQjF/1000876634.png)
this image was designed with canva design app
Welcome to week #12! Each week, we are faced with the decision of what to and what not to eat. The sure thing is that we must eat food to remain healthy. Some persons have it in abundance whereas others struggle to eat. A lot of factors determine the food we eat each week and each day. Hence, good becomes very important that we can't avoid it no matter what. By means if this contest, let us see what good you were able to eat each week and what factors pushed you into eating it. This is to say that you have to show or present the highlights of some, not all of the foods you ate within the week. Just the pictures of about 4 foods you ate, the description of the food so that we can know what it is called and how it is eaten, what day you are it and the factors that made you to settle for that food. Interesting 🤔! Not so? I want to see your style, I want to see varieties. Take a look at this post that I made that represents the highlight of the food I ate last week https://steemit.com/steem-kids-parents/@ngoenyi/highlight-of-my-menu-for-the-week-take-a-look
Contest Hints
| |- * Present at most 4 pictures of the different foods you ate within the week. It must be for the current week. You must not wait until the end of the week since it is just the highlight * Describe the food, the name, the ingredients (just the predominant ingredients), how is it eaten, and what day you are it. You can even share the recipe if you can. * What are the factors that made you to settle for this food? Is it because of finance, what is available in your culture, what the family decides, your cravings and so on. Just be creative and let us learn. * You can add video if you can (optional)
Contest guides
| |- * Publish your entry in Steem kids and parents community * Upvote, resteem and mention me, @ngoenyi so that I will know when you drop your entry * Use these compulsory tags #wfoodhighlightw12 #steemexclusive and your country tag example #nigeria * The topic should be **My Weekly Food Highlight, Take a look** *Drop your entry as a comment under this contest posts * Make sure to share your entry link on x or twitter * Avoid plagiarism and AI because you will be disqualified * Invite at least 3 friends to take part in this contest * Entry will end in 7 days time or when the contest is renewed.
How winners will be rewarded
||- * Community curators will be on the lookout for your quality entry to support you. So make sure your presentation is the best pictures, the best writeup and so on * @steemkidss will upvote your entry to encourage you * 5 sp will be shared to 3 winners at the ratio of 2.5:1.5:1. The 1st winner will get 2.5 so, 2nd will get 1.5 and the 3rd will get 1 respectively. ###
Winners 🏆 🏆 🏆 for week #11
![1000890823.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRmzsavzUFyZjoAr86WL9Fzk77R9E19JD1PEFKfLW5ZG7/1000890823.png)
this image was designed with canva design app
Thank you dear participants for taking part in this delicious 😋 food highlights contest for week 11. In deed, you guys have made wonderful presentations of all the delicious food your ate Username|post link|a picture of one of the foods |---|---|---| @zulay7059|[entry link](https://steemit.com/steem-kids-parents/@zulay7059/mis-platos-mas-destacados-de-esta-semana)|![17707813627473119639985362843144.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUQfGoU7KFaCfcCWHzePA5AfA2v1JCjwY2XgfAyb25vMx/17707813627473119639985362843144.jpg) @rooshiasif99|[entry link](https://steemit.com/steem-kids-parents/@roohiasif99/week11-begins-my-weekly-food-highlights-take-a-look-20jk2x)|![17707814302671685997931748696204.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZ8hqCc6R13raPD7bmCwSgNVcVG4JGk5Pr1DrCprUcUZd/17707814302671685997931748696204.jpg) From the foregoing, 2 users participated and the prize 🏆 is for 2 of them. The winners are announced this; @zulay7059 1st place @roohiasif99 2nd place Your rewards have been sent and below is the evidence. Congratulations 🎉 🎉 🎉 🎉 👏 👏 👏 to you all! Looking forward to seeing your delicious meals again in this current contest. ![1001059698.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdatM6SSRpuFf6xzhTAHiwyC5ZQjswSxgWzkEivyjMtLZ/1001059698.jpg) I wish you all the best in your entries Cc: @steemkidss

author: m-princess
title: SLC29-W5 // "Boiled Chicken Recipes"
text:
## 💐In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful💐 ![Grey and Cream Simple Mashed Potatoes Food YouTube Thumbnail_20260213_074808_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXfsgdJgmngYNV4erw9daD5vWZWGDZoVq1qSix5wYB5h2/Grey_and_Cream_Simple_Mashed_Potatoes_Food_YouTube_Thumbnail_20260213_074808_0000.png) ***Made by Canva*** ![20250901_113508_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVYagcJLEwteuohPxY78tBXHxgtiSafU5uY2fXPE8btLB/20250901_113508_0000.png) |
Greatings to all!
| |-|
|
Hey community friends.
| |-| >> ***By the blessings of Allah I am fine and I hope you are all well too. With the prayers of my parents and the grace of Allah my days are going very well. Today I am participating in this delicious and tasty contest organized by our dear ma'am. This is a very amazing and tasty contest. I could not stop myself from participating in it. So today I have made "Boiled Chicken Recipes" in a very simple and unique way. I hope that people will like my recipe today. So let's start.***. ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |
Have you tried boiled chicken recipes?? What recipe your family likes?
| |-| Yes guys I have made boiled chicken many times and to be honest. Everyone in the house loves its taste. Boiled chicken seems simple but when it is mixed with potatoes or spices and made into tikkis or kebabs every bite makes the heart happy. I often boil the chicken until it is tender then make small patties with boiled potatoes coriander and green chillies and fry them lightly on a tawa. When they turn golden and fragrant I am happy to hear everyone in the house complimenting me. Sometimes I also mix it with salads or light vegetables and sometimes I stuff it in small rolls or sandwiches and give it to the family. My younger brother and sister really like its taste. Whenever I make any boiled chicken or any dish mixed with vegetables. They all eat it happily whenever it comes in front of them. Dishes made with boiled chicken at home also give us all a chance to sit together talk and eat delicious things. These small joys of food bring smiles to everyone's faces and that is why to enjoy these beautiful moments. I keep making some different type of thing which includes boiled chicken vegetables and all the other things. ![Purple Flower Wedding Photo Collage_20260213_133605_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYrAdvAWeZtSb9XbpxD1ZzMzSzrQTfZRPhqPpsYoU5Qys/Purple_Flower_Wedding_Photo_Collage_20260213_133605_0000.png) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |
Make the chicken recipe that is shared in the course / or any one with boiled chicken that you like.with a detailed step-by-step procedure along with images.
| |-|
***Here are the ingredients***:👇
|Sr|ingredients| |--|--| |1|Boiled Shredded chicken | |2|carrot 🥕| |3|Capsicum 🫑| |4|Cabbage| |5|Chopped Onion 🧅| |6|Potato 🥔| |7|Green coriander| |8|Dried coriander powder| |9|Egg 🥚| |10|Cumin powder| |11|Chilli flakes | |12|Red chilli powder| |13|Salt| |14|Black pepper| |15|Chopped green chilli| ![IMG_20260213_145959_016.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRSd7eKjnM5uv9o4AQUgpSYQkHpWqBuMvi11WCvm7cDbY/IMG_20260213_145959_016.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - First I boiled the potatoes and cooled them. Now I put them in a pot and mashed them with a masher. Guys I had taken about 1 kg of potatoes which I boiled and peeled. Next I put a cup of chopped carrots to it. Then I added a cupful of chopped cabbage to it. I added a cup of chopped capsicum to it.
|![IMG_20260213_150141_039.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNoSCLS91wLFwF5dpFzYBQg552wuFjE1uJqACUtyibJ1L/IMG_20260213_150141_039.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_150435_107.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPGmHKbBvV8Fk6XTjhSLj5VGGPxtbyxm8R5WmXaGfUsuu/IMG_20260213_150435_107.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_150450_161.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmet5BB1EQvVsU8PewkzzWabjoRXRkV95eT2pW8iFLbbmV/IMG_20260213_150450_161.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_150512_509.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfRJ9bd3Yfaz6BzPf8xendgCw3nbCsx6ENycHtDj7M5rY/IMG_20260213_150512_509.jpg)| | - |
![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - I took about four medium sized onions and chopped them. After adding the vegetables. I added the onions to it. After adding the onions I added two cups of shredded chicken. Then I mixed all of these things well with my hands. Before adding all of my other spices.
|![IMG_20260213_150523_506.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQpMgHEncXcsKum7Cmbi8iz8qmU1g27zk9UfNEnN7TVQR/IMG_20260213_150523_506.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_150546_242.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQPxv8sxUnwijm3ZajGHMepuMRdeX6zxmnF4ftrXV6Lfk/IMG_20260213_150546_242.jpg)| | - |
![IMG_20260213_150811_170.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmaVD2MHL6nhaTFSbsYJCfKmoQbkbcC7FoDVPK9Kh2RBSQ/IMG_20260213_150811_170.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - Then I added chopped green chili and green coriander to it. Next  guys I added two tablespoons of red chilies powder three teaspoons of ground black pepper and one tablespoon of dried coriander powder. One tablespoon of cumin powder. One teaspoon of black pepper powder and along with that I added salt as required. Then again with the help of my hands I mixed all these spices well with vegetables. And after that the mixture was ready to be made into boiled chicken and vegetable tikkis.
|![IMG_20260213_150832_711.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdSP46jH2FxQ29wnTiydTgW88yLywdggsgyVyMKhFLnaW/IMG_20260213_150832_711.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_150848_547.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPTpzrgZQxP2dDH2FBxH54RBr4vfTnBBo5apj8Ui9Tikm/IMG_20260213_150848_547.jpg)| | - |
![IMG_20260213_151634_665.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPNnDVR2GEGp1XWuueiRcyFRBciHSwpcsU6kbr18yNHh1/IMG_20260213_151634_665.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - Then I washed my hands thoroughly with soap.  After that I made the tikkis and put them in a dish. I made them round and neither too thick nor too thin. I made them into beautiful little pieces in a medium size. ![IMG_20260213_154056_550.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNZ3zH7ZWZwAXjn5FwA2Mus1aLdKRjg6vcgXSesnG69AS/IMG_20260213_154056_550.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - After making the tikkis it was time to fry them. Now to fry them i broke the egg in a plate and beat it well. At the same time, I put the pan on the stove and heated it well by adding oil to it. Then I turned the flame some slow. I took a tikkis dipped it in the egg on both sides. Added it to the hot oil and fried the tikkis well.
|![IMG_20260213_161421_139.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQ3dwd5exHfcAtJpXW727yMR2FemJ2diVi9CEeGU4DUfg/IMG_20260213_161421_139.jpg)| | - |
|![IMG_20260213_161435_532.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmadrzbqwMFpsvPF3TL7h5G2RnS9esrKNxAUNgHG4j4R7w/IMG_20260213_161435_532.jpg)| | - |
![IMG_20260213_161534_341.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUiwJ89QHfWE4hW3SktcCX9ynjqTh37MALoQhRnKgtoU9/IMG_20260213_161534_341.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) - I fried the tikkis that I made with my boiled chicken and vegetables in two ways. I also fried them with an egg coating. Apart from that, I put tawa on the stove and added oil to it heated it well and without dipped the tikkis in the egg. I also fried them in this way. Similarly, I fried them in a simple way and both the methods made the tikkis very tasty but each one had its own flavor and its own taste. After that I made them into a chutney of mint and green chillies and added it to yogurt to make raita and served the plain delicious chicken boiled vegetable tikkis to the family with salad. ![IMG_20260213_162523_919.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYt4jBP3sKxvBuXeBbPXB2y9wciEFPQkNkM9VvBw3ouxR/IMG_20260213_162523_919.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) ## ***Final picture***: ![IMG_20260213_170304_539.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVXvc6VWiLidvCrizEDFeJMepqxqEtzgt5b6VmSfxEc69/IMG_20260213_170304_539.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |
Make a good Presentation of your recipe.
| |-| ![Beige Minimalist Interior Design Photo Collage_20260213_123943_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWxisjjdDHLviprgtDx917CQ245ctuQakUwNE4BNKi339/Beige_Minimalist_Interior_Design_Photo_Collage_20260213_123943_0000.png) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) > ## ***Final picture with my identification sign with: username and date***. ![IMG_20260213_171306_840.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXhcpov55Z25S2HCe8QkWFfVNxPc4ghfgk7fqSd8nTpEd/IMG_20260213_171306_840.jpg) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |

| |-| Price list of ingredients with my local and steem price:👇 |Sr|ingredients|PKR|Steem| |--|--|--|--| |1|Chicken boneless 300g|300|20| |2|carrot 🥕|15|1| |3|Capsicum 🫑|30|2| |4|Cabbage|60|4| |5|Onion 🧅|15|1| |6|Potato 🥔|15|1| |7|Green coriander|15|1| |8|All spices|30|2| |9|Egg 🥚|60|4| |Total|-|525|35| ![Purple Flower Wedding Photo Collage_20260213_133834_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTSMKmpVq5o9BAVXYPif8Nx7heoWS2ugH7jpig1nYNNLg/Purple_Flower_Wedding_Photo_Collage_20260213_133834_0000.png) ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) >> ***Sure you all achieve your dreams and find peace and do not forget about me in your prayers***. 🥰 ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |
Last I invited my friends @ahsansharif ,  @wilmer1988 , @otisbrown , @wirngo and @paholags for taking part in this contest.
| |-| ![Untitled design_20250901_113723_0000.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNmgusPLG5r4qCPfzsuTx9qKbdEQjuquLNJEdCYNuqQYm/Untitled_design_20250901_113723_0000.png) |
Thank you so much friends. For giving your valuable time to my post, for reading it and for making beautiful comments on it.

author: jimiaera02
title: SLC29-W5 | Fast Food Recipe : Chicken Jhalmuri Recipe.
text:
I invite all my Steemit friends to the fifth week of the Fast Food Recipe competition of The Steemit Challenge Season 29. In the fifth week of the competition, we will be making a delicious Chicken Jhalmuri Recipe. Without further ado, let's get to the recipe. Thank you to @selina1 for organizing this great competition. ![IMG-20260212-.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTQgT9ypjJsCgnw1MAEeUBgBZQUBz5QKdYa7UbnvHt7RE/IMG-20260212-.jpg)
------------------- ------------------- > > Make the recipe mentioned above and describe the detailed method with pictures. ![IMG_20260212_104938.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmagXqkmsGvR4FATYTyGL6nxDTUyPDq4gdAAMP7ayy3LkW/IMG_20260212_104938.jpg) |Ingredients |Quantity |Ingredients |Quantity | |- |- |- |- | |Muri| 3 cups|Chicken meat|1/2 cup| |Boiled chickpeas|1 cup|Potato|3 medium pcs| |Onion| 1/2 cup|Green chillies|3 pcs| |Coriander leaves|2 tbsp|Turmeric powder |1/3 tsp| |Chili powder|1/2 tsp|Cumin powder|1/2 tsp| |Garam masala powder|1/4 tsp|Tomato|1 pcs| |Salt|As required |Oil|2 tbsp| ------------------- -------------------
##
**🍅Making Process🍅**
#
------------------- -------------------
***Step 1:*** To make the Chicken Jhalmuri recipe, you need to do some preparation, for this I took chicken, onion, boiled potatoes, tomatoes and green chillies. I peeled the boiled potatoes and onion, then washed and cleaned the chicken, onion, tomatoes and green chillies. I chopped the chicken, onion, tomatoes and green chillies, washed and cleaned the chicken pieces in water and drained the water. ![IMG_20260212_105038.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTcrR4p6pTGh1tbTsAhJA1rUdbfqHNSe1xwm6yoZ5PXgo/IMG_20260212_105038.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_110031.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZVKNLPmQ85gzTqrv4vmuPTGcigFw3K43gCn17d4g8pEK/IMG_20260212_110031.jpg) |- |- | ***Step 2:*** I took the chicken pieces in a mixing bowl, marinated them with a little turmeric powder, half a teaspoon of chili powder, salt to taste, cumin powder, and coriander powder. ![IMG_20260212_110338.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbopqtvBxz8tXJscyJmdUWzoJzKeMpZYj58JxAN9PG49B/IMG_20260212_110338.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_110437.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXpXseQYedTqcW4uzGj1o9SuxV8pGvjGieguGn85Mhkam/IMG_20260212_110437.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_110523.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQma8bxAWcMZ124EZzYCqVdi6v5YYKS6JUqPaP7euA73XDF/IMG_20260212_110523.jpg) |- |- |- | ***Step 3:*** I heated oil in a pan on the stove to fry the marinated chicken pieces. When the oil was hot, I poured the chicken pieces into the oil. I fried the chicken pieces by stirring them, since the chicken pieces were cut into small pieces, they did not take long to cook well. When the chicken pieces turned brown, I took them out in another bowl. ![IMG_20260212_110731.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbyzcf3vBhnEsZe7eEC7YGeA6QnwAHTWsP8dBv5zR8pt8/IMG_20260212_110731.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_110743.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVYihKMHcPXxg73dxzSCLkUWi4d1UBVeRjyapEDpPH5fc/IMG_20260212_110743.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_111139.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmT6MN3FfCwbvrgArrauoFizSuJfNbtGLqBjaFWzyun5KM/IMG_20260212_111139.jpg) |- |- |- | ***Step 4:*** I added the chopped onion to the remaining oil in the pan and sautéed it. When the chopped onion became soft, I added the ginger paste and garlic paste and fried it for a few seconds until the raw smell was gone. Then I added the powdered spices and mixed it with a little water so that the powdered spices do not burn. ![IMG_20260212_111700.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXjywWxMPDHo2Lk3y3BijaGiLvBj3BVTUTiKiYtCN9z66/IMG_20260212_111700.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_111803.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmaSjdHfr3mFqxLZn1JoAaNniN1XrXDZhzmyAhi1S6ZyFK/IMG_20260212_111803.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_111948.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmcBaRuHW5zk5VTHtUJhjCE8uxoDjb4hy169FBoMj85f4D/IMG_20260212_111948.jpg) |- |- |- | ***Step 5:*** Once the spices were ground, I added the boiled chickpeas, then stirred and mixed them with the spices. After adding the mashed boiled potatoes in succession, I stirred everything again and cooked for some time. At the end of cooking the chickpeas, I added chopped coriander leaves. I stirred everything again and cooked for two minutes, and the chickpea mixture was ready. ![IMG_20260212_112059.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWJG7M5ACpi4Codid9dmwJKYBHXwt2fnJwhdpZaLtLd5F/IMG_20260212_112059.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_112134.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRRrevkzoQHwPnkMHMcCJm6fuJQxCapRBABQcrDUM9iNg/IMG_20260212_112134.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_112325.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfR6RZLU5R7Gt8tk9jznaEme27r1XF6Gas7TA3KgKM24z/IMG_20260212_112325.jpg) |- |- |- | ![IMG_20260212_112356.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWH6sfeXAYBNaAtiNGQQhEYbFyZ6jCLExZ5L5pbbV7Jzz/IMG_20260212_112356.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_112610.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWm2h5eDku4nCew5LGCtoV6gTi71QcVYNY7kp1rsrjCjD/IMG_20260212_112610.jpg) |- |- | ***Step 6:*** At this stage, in a mixing bowl, I added chopped onion, chopped green chillies and salt to taste and mashed it with my hands. Then I mixed it well with the muri and mustard oil. Once all the ingredients were mixed with the muri, I added the cooked chickpeas and fried chicken. Then after mixing everything well with the muri again, I added chopped tomatoes and coriander leaves and stirred it. Now the delicious chicken jhalmuri is ready to serve. ![IMG_20260212_113301.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmSyeymRpwWN6KkhRq39cvAgMgdNGpo1wLBgkybKvLoj2h/IMG_20260212_113301.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_113334.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmetaMM5BjLNHGBNT7fdfLRssbk9pb8UDr2WrhXQF6Q3wX/IMG_20260212_113334.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_113423.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQma63mcoB1waftcGox5AaRNFccQpgfhq1y3dW8wuNhvXrH/IMG_20260212_113423.jpg) |- |- |- | ![IMG_20260212_113623.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeckYXa4FwxPJnCSKZHAJtC4Pr1pXz2xb3KWepuWiXzaJ/IMG_20260212_113623.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_113726.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZcxf9Q9dsFcptLNNHM2Bo155REjtiBWAeeU2cfGBrcMP/IMG_20260212_113726.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_114329.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmcE8pRsBkjRaG81G7HwfUzQVyaNhzcEgR6CoP1zrGA5Zq/IMG_20260212_114329.jpg) |- |- |- | ![IMG_20260212_115016.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdD78eqYVNefbEkTMNVZyehHhQDjKaBgDGFUQhZ52C6aC/IMG_20260212_115016.jpg)Delicious Chicken Jhalmuri Ready to Serve | |- |
------------------- -------------------
> > Who in your family would you like to share the recipe with? ![IMG_20260212_115016.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdD78eqYVNefbEkTMNVZyehHhQDjKaBgDGFUQhZ52C6aC/IMG_20260212_115016.jpg) I want to share Chicken Jhalmuri with my elder son, because my elder son loves to eat this Jhalmuri very much. It would not be wrong to say that he can also make very delicious Jhalmuri himself and sometimes he makes it for me.🤗 My sons love to try all kinds of recipes from my hand and I also love to serve different recipes for them. So I would love to enjoy the great taste of Chicken Jhalmuri with my sons.
------------------- -------------------
> > You are having trouble finding an ingredient for a recipe.Create a price list of recipe ingredients (prices in your local currency and in steem). * I had no problem finding the ingredients for the recipe. I had the ingredients for making Chicken Jhalmuri at home, so I had no problem gathering the ingredients for the recipe. I have listed the local prices and steem prices of all the ingredients used in the recipe below.👇👇 ![IMG_20260212_104938.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmagXqkmsGvR4FATYTyGL6nxDTUyPDq4gdAAMP7ayy3LkW/IMG_20260212_104938.jpg) |Ingredients |Bdt Price |Steem Price | |- |- |- | |Muri, Chicken meat|60 bdt|5.4 steem| |Boiled chickpeas,Onion|40 bdt|3.5 steem| |Ginger & garlic paste |10 bdt|0.9 steem| |Green chillies,Coriander leaves|10 bdt|0.9 steem| |Turmeric powder, Chili powder|10 bdt|0.9 steem| |Cumin powder & garam masala powder|10 bdt|0.9 steem| |Salt,Cooking Oil|20 bdt|1.5 steem| |Tomato,Potato|20 bdt|1.5 steem|
------------------- -------------------
> > Present the recipe in an attractive presentation using your username,recipe name and date written on a piece of paper. * The following is an interesting presentation of my Chicken Jhalmuri recipe my username, recipe name, and date written on a piece of paper as per the contest rules; ![IMG_20260212_115016.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdD78eqYVNefbEkTMNVZyehHhQDjKaBgDGFUQhZ52C6aC/IMG_20260212_115016.jpg) |![IMG_20260212_115006.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWDqqUdGtXTaMW3U3etNB5t5gMczmm3pk3i77VLjxd3ZL/IMG_20260212_115006.jpg) |- |- | ![IMG_20260212_115503.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZgo9gzarT5dd4UvwNUYqiYxqTm9wNq5ypGhNB4byhbZu/IMG_20260212_115503.jpg) ![f85of4KXmvsQJy974FRvm9w7ttkZ9K7PZ8JeKKtLWsiCW1GbQRTenjkYKWFU39cSTPSs7tGHFsEMtgL1neSRqgLjbfYgZf9DEzFnTWS13HYnn2ygjSrkboA49Ay83fRaHrmgZXYznRAnrtGxF8HEph8XSBjv6FfBdpCXrLLpje8wZwtdjrAFbVErMUPbCVhJc9uBnJ6UEJ.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfAkUqGw5uy1jNmTcb68ECgENHtdXjHrr83YSaNXr9hjW/f85of4KXmvsQJy974FRvm9w7ttkZ9K7PZ8JeKKtLWsiCW1GbQRTenjkYKWFU39cSTPSs7tGHFsEMtgL1neSRqgLjbfYgZf9DEzFnTWS13HYnn2ygjSrkboA49Ay83fRaHrmgZXYznRAnrtGxF8HEph8XSBjv6FfBdpCXrLLpje8wZwtdjrAFbVErMUPbCVhJc9uBnJ6UEJ.png) I'm ending this here for today, I'll be back in next week of this competition everyone stay safe. May Allah protect you. |
In this beautiful contest I would like to invite @sualeha @kiwiscanfly @suboohi
| |-|

author: alexanderpeace
title: Oat pancake in a bit
text:
![Image cover](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPzmLS9HWx2hRfedyYLSHpPTVKjcLdtTDRxtRqMvpheoq/IMG_2672.jpeg)
Greetings fam and it’s another time to explore something new but popular. Maybe what we all know and are used to but this time around with a healthy twist. Yea, away from the norm. Well, if you are like me and love a good and quick breakfast like our regular pancakes which would always come in handy but made with flour. Flour we all know is a processed food and mostly not advisable to be consumed often. Well, how beautiful it would still be to eat what we would love to eat but this time around differently. Have you thought of substituting that processed flour with something more healthy and would also give us a better feel and taste. That’s what I did in this tutorial. So instead of making our regular pancake with flour, let’s do oat pancake instead. Yes, we substitute the processed flour with oats. You can choose to grind your oats into flour for a smoother feel or you can relish the delicacy just like that. In my case, I love it a little crunchy, so I grind just a little. Oats are very healthy and good source of fiber. And need I say that they are very satiable too and makes for better feeling and aids bowel movement and weight loss due to their high fiber content. So having said that, let’s quickly dive into the video tutorial on how to make oats pancake and ofcourse with a warm cup of chocolate. Hmmmm, you will like it. https://youtu.be/QyvGiSbjdh4?si=13_U_aX78ylRozqm
Posted with [Speem](https://speem.watch/)

author: mhmaruf
title: SLC29-W5 | Fast Food Recipe : Chicken Jhalmuri Recipe.
text:
![IMG_20260213_212325.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmcWaWQ1zbt56F8WEo4iXjW3e5f3DSuZCXgcEobz3VbgBP/IMG_20260213_212325.jpg) Hello dear friends, how are you all? I hope you are doing well by the grace of Allah. I am also doing well, Alhamdulillah. Today I have come to you with a very wonderful recipe post. I have posted a recipe before. It has been a long time, so today I am going to participate in this recipe post again. Actually, I like participating in competitions. So I try to participate in different competitions at different times. I like posting recipes because I really like making recipes. Today, I am going to share a recipe for Chicken Jhal Muri with you. Because this is part of today's competition. I had a lot of fun making the recipe and enjoyed it with my family. So, I have basically shared with you how I made this recipe, the ingredients and how I did it in detail step by step below. So let's get started.
![IMG_20260213_203931.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRxzBPPQkbtrdmHMe8bhxwo7EdoBGYKPdj3wzE2aMaYLD/IMG_20260213_203931.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_210322.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmfPFANwTvxpnsd3aR6JrSocKvN17j38QYqPg2AvvK8EbN/IMG_20260213_210322.jpg)

Ingredients

Name | Quantity | ------------ | ------------- | Muri | 1 Bowl Chicken Meat | 1 Cup Boiled Chickpeas | 1 Cup Boiled Potato | Small 5 pieces Green Chili | 5 Pieces Soybean Oil | 4 Tablespoon Onion | 2 Pieces Tomato | 1 Piece Coriander Leaves | To taste Turmeric Powder | 1/2 Tablespoon Chili Powder | 1/2 Tablespoon Cumin Powder | 1/3 Tablespoon Coriander Powder | 1/3 Tablespoon Ginger Garlic Paste | 2 Tablespoon Salt | As needed
![IMG_20260213_204036.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQiRuWiQ5MNR54Lm3urMvWZzkeJ1Dug4Rn3HxQETqYVfU/IMG_20260213_204036.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_204108.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRUz9gVm9zRL3JvYBTwoi2UXy4ewRwGgCeSWtdM8VRdGE/IMG_20260213_204108.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_204124.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWDoWEcp1RHQw4ftNBa9CrqsDPQVu9UFyKx1zz6UhpcoC/IMG_20260213_204124.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_204156.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXTAg95crjPjxbS4L33XYsaWEr4yEKQVHvE64d7MZeZnX/IMG_20260213_204156.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_204306.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmabFWegKw3BRCxTMBTwmN7fQz5wzdeksnUMhJ3g5SUURe/IMG_20260213_204306.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_204356.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmPpAU36dAYATdqiopXqaQuzvvz1gGmHegxrnNqVtSMn6m/IMG_20260213_204356.jpg)
First I took a bowl of muri and a cup of chicken. Along with that I took a cup of boiled potatoes and 5 small boiled potatoes. Then I took 5 green chillies, soybean oil, onion, tomato, coriander leaves, turmeric powder, chili powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, ginger garlic paste and salt. I have mentioned these in the above table in the quantities. I hope you can understand when you see my table that I have made the quantities clear. ![IMG_20260213_204912.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVrhT2Yu3YGZKXhS9niJFn6fCCypY2m1NmJTGR9fixG8w/IMG_20260213_204912.jpg) ![4.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdArY6VY77Kje9F1vkY4BePu7ZMbWGW89C7L7VhKw29Ye/4.jpg) Then I first took soybean oil in a pan. When the oil was a little hot, I dropped the onion slices in it. After stirring the onion slices in the oil for a few seconds, I added the chicken. ![5.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmbCmyuKWc3TwVZhVTw5W9QJ7BLXTAEAcCfXtB1kafiiqt/5.jpg) Then I cooked them for a while to change their color. In between, I added the boiled potatoes to the paste. After a while, I left the boiled potatoes in between. After cooking for a while, I added coriander leaves in between. ![IMG_20260213_210445.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmSxjmogCRunyWMVYJzAxDomArxh79rF78jbTcKTtx9oXU/IMG_20260213_210445.jpg) ![IMG_20260213_210520.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWxmqB3rqcaMFQKUbzudmR7LDVWNS2BZByHyejcow3SjE/IMG_20260213_210520.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_210805.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUVTkM94wJd7AHVhcnwZXjdah2Wh3q9x3Q7yXpczhsEYR/IMG_20260213_210805.jpg)
![IMG_20260213_210817.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZuBrdBHc8K7ZksRTt89zvFWU7N2P46i3ior63gQXyR4a/IMG_20260213_210817.jpg)
Then I served them in a bowl, along with chopped green chillies and tomatoes. Then I mixed the muri and this mixture together in a bowl. ![IMG_20260213_211321.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQma91RH2BEodHqmDNpmAoGeKPXJmcmbo41izKmqbNSCach/IMG_20260213_211321.jpg)

2.Who in your family would you like to share the recipe with?

I shared the recipe with my family with great joy. Everyone in my family liked it very much. We are a family of 4, everyone liked this recipe. We enjoyed this chicken jhal muri with great fun. Actually, we really like eating jhal muri, and today's jhal chicken muri turned out to be amazing and tasted great.

3. You are having trouble finding an ingredient for a recipe.Create a price list of recipe ingredients (prices in your local currency and in steem).

Actually, I have prepared to make the recipe. I had all the ingredients in my house. I had everything in stock in my store, so I did not have to face any problem for anything. Since I had all the ingredients with me, I was able to make this recipe very nicely. Actually, Jhalmuri is almost eaten as a snack by us, so it is very popular and we have the ingredients almost all the time. Moreover, I added chicken meat, which I already had. So I am sharing the price of the ingredients with you below. So I hope you will like my recipe today. ## Price List Sl. No. | Product Name | BDT Price | Steem Price ------------ | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- 1 | Puffed Rice (Muri) | 15 tk | 2.50 2 | Chicken Meat | 60 tk | 10.00 3 | Boiled Chickpeas | 30 tk | 5.00 4 | Boiled Potato | 10 tk | 1.67 5 | Green Chili | 15 tk | 2.50 6 | Soybean Oil | 30 tk | 5.00 7 | Onion | 20 tk | 3.33 8 | Tomato | 6 tk | 1.00 9 | Coriander Leaves | 20 tk | 3.33 10 | Turmeric Powder | 10 tk | 1.67 11 | Chili Powder | 20 tk | 3.33 12 | Cumin Powder | 20 tk | 3.33 13 | Coriander Powder | 10 tk | 1.67 14 | Ginger Garlic Paste | 10 tk | 1.67 15 | Salt | 5 tk | 0.83 # I am mentioning three of my friends. @ahp93 @thhridoy @fasoniya
Posted using [SteemX](https://steemx.org/)

author: k655
title: Loose weight naturally
text:
**Healthy and permanent weightloss** 

![image.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmaSpkgyXAPZ9uRMyJyryAAzeba8aaWTzLCqv7eYFEuZ5e/image.png)

**1. Nutrition** 
Intermittent fasting: e.g., fast for 16 hours, eat within 8 hours.
Protein-rich meals: meat, fish, eggs, legumes, dairy.
Less sugar & refined carbs: choose whole grains, fruits, nuts.
Fiber: vegetables, fruits, whole grains, beans.
Healthy gut flora: probiotic foods (yogurt, sauerkraut, kimchi) plus fiber.

**2. Eating Habits**
Mindful eating: eat slowly, chew well, avoid distractions, notice fullness.
Food diary: track meals and exercise to stay aware.


**3. Lifestyle**
Enough sleep: 7–9 hours, helps regulate hunger hormones.
Reduce stress: breathing exercises, relaxation, avoid stress eating.
Regular exercise: about 150 minutes per week + strength training.

**4. Important Notes**
Avoid crash diets or extreme rapid weight loss — they are unhealthy and often lead to regaining weight.
Better: slow, steady, and healthy habits.
Seek support from a dietitian or doctor if needed.

author: shohana1
title: Traditional Sweets & Cakes- 📣 ✨ THE BEST FOOD POST ✨ 📣WEEK #161
text:
Greetings Everyone, This is [SHOHANA](https://steemit.com/@shohana1/posts) From #Bangladesh
| -|
Almost forgot to share my food post for this week. Suddenly I recall it and I'm not late for this luckily. Here I come with my recent food story and these photos are my recently capture food photo collection. I've many in my gallery but as you know I try to follow the theme and this week's theme is again traditional sweets and cakes. All are delicious and sweet. Many of you know that I've sweet tooth and I eat sugary foods most of the time. But I rarely eat traditional sweets. This week's sweet traditional food menu are, Yellow Laddu, Motichur laddu, kalojam and malpua pancakes. All carrying our traditional charm and we love them having occasionally. Malpua is a kind of homemade pancake, no wonder that bakery added this item for city people as we hardly get time to prepare this kind of traditional pancake at home. Dhaka is the busiest city and people here busy to build their career so whenever they need to taste something homemade they can buy pancakes like malpua, it carries traditional flavor. Have a look on food photography this week--- ###
My Photography On Delicious Food Fun
![image.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmWCD6Pn2euGYeLjbrCYKqc5FbtMzZ19hYYSVFEwQfm31a/image.png) **
Yellow Laddu - Traditional sweet
** ![image.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQf5mSQefpYBCKCUG726zYzjovMWcerG52bPYT3hTfMwN/image.png) **
Kalojam - Traditional Sweet
** ![image.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQLSACKLBWcckyXAHbZNDweDdpW8UmXPQdcJ8wtVU95PW/image.png) **
Malpua, a popular traditional South Asian sweet pancake
** ![image.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRiVrhCsT5QrCe1K5RvSKvfzJXz2QU3A5SNtWPcDoN482/image.png) **
Motichoor Laddu- traditional sweet in the bakery
** Let me talk about other items though this is not my first time food blog on traditional sweets. Many of you should be familiar with these sweets that represent our tradition very well. Kalojam is soft and Sponge, most of the sweet lovers love to have it for it's softness. Such an awesome item as comfort food or dessert. I personally like this but prefer eating in a moderation. Motichur laddu is more commonly found sweet in India though we also have it occasionally. Hindu community people use this sweet item on their worship events. We eat it as desert item. It taste good and belongs to our tradition as well. Yellow laddu kinda looks like motichur laddu but these are different by taste. I'm familiar with the taste of both and both are too good to eat. That's all for this week. I've a good collection of food photographs and aim to add more in near future. I often visit bakeries in my city and I usually buy different kinds of chocolates. Sometimes for a change I also taste our traditional sweets but that's rare. I'm a sweet lover but I can't eat a lot of sweets at a time, my stomach can't digest much, LOL. Hope you find this food post full of fun! ![line1.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTMLKcmPNEn7WPPExKdfP1vCfpZ8SwrqECQtMTADRXvBo/line1.png) ##
Thanks For Stopping By
**Love & Peace ❤️😇**
**A #steemexclusive Blog Written By @shohana1**
![ilovesteemit.gif](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNpxGJiwatQ3z9zAWgnQBaXEpMizK9dQDeF8hjApTNq89/ilovesteemit.gif)

author: narocky71
title: SLC29-W5 // "Boiled Chicken Recipes"
text:
![1000069852.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUV969mfDvVS9VLNhoszcsbXxirpizdYBt8jvHfxutoJy/1000069852.jpg)

ℍ𝕖𝕝𝕝𝕠 𝔽𝕣𝕚𝕖𝕟𝕕𝕤

How is everyone? Hope everybody is well. As always, I have come to you today with a fun recipe post. Today I will share with you all some very fun Boiled Chicken Recipes. I have tried my best to make this recipe very well. I really like to eat such fun recipes. However, on the occasion of the competition, I tried to make the whole recipe well. Although I initially thought that I might not be able to make it well. But in the end, I felt incredibly happy to be able to make it well. This recipe does not require much time to make and does not require many ingredients. The ingredients needed to make this recipe are almost always available at home. So anyone can make the recipe very easily. After making this recipe, I had a lot of fun with my family. I hope you will also like the whole recipe I made today. ![1000069855.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYReUre8XgpUmfGGC2A1mgtEcY8ugEsNnY2ygjW4mVRmR/1000069855.jpg)

𝐈𝐧𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬

Ingredients | Quantity ------------ | ------------- chicken | 150 potato | 1 piece Carrot | 1/2 piece Garlic | one tablespoon Coriander leaves | 3 tablespoon Turmeric powder | 1 tablespoon Chili powder | 1 tablespoon Spices powder | 1 tablespoon Green chili | 3 tablespoon Onion | 4 tablespoon Salt | In quantity oil | In quantity
![IMG20260210185944.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTmA3c9ayy6LJQAHnMEet28uAeVaGC3HnCB31YGThAMcf/IMG20260210185944.jpg) ### Make the chicken recipe that is shared in the course / or any one with boiled chicken that you like.with a detailed step-by-step procedure along with images.

◦•●◉✿ step by step ✿◉●•◦

I first took the boiled potatoes in a plate. And I took the boiled chickens. Then I started breaking the chickens well with my hands. In this way, I broke the chickens well. Then I started breaking the potatoes. ![IMG_20260212_105953.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmNrPbGyLoWhwfZF3ggyXr2r7Xtd1vXmAF3NstPpVQrGWb/IMG_20260212_105953.jpg) In this way, I broke the onions very well. They have to be broken very well. So that everything is mixed. After breaking the potatoes and chickens well, I added the chopped onions to them. ![IMG_20260212_110012.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmRA2WdqHKMq4PHXn5KLYQSkMmJkgAi7NUiC7epRnddSmH/IMG_20260212_110012.jpg) After adding the chopped onions to them, I added chopped green chilies. Then I added chopped coriander leaves. Then I added the chopped carrots. I chopped the carrots very finely. ![IMG_20260212_110040.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmXvktrEeoLdYVoNXEk1VFGTBxm2FPhEvv7AYhkGEvu2ZQ/IMG_20260212_110040.jpg) Then I took the garlic in the right amount. Then I added the garlic in the right amount. Then I added the turmeric powder in the right amount. Then I added the spices in the right amount. ![IMG_20260212_110056.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmdprpEmEbZEpFdEFgk2NC6cWBY16sP87cLDge82QVpzDX/IMG_20260212_110056.jpg) Then I added the chili powder in the right amount. Then I added a few quantities of salt. In this way, I added each ingredient here one by one. ![IMG_20260212_110119.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTL2jSBBsccFqgGPCtoq7TeqxGxQYvxKRdMcyyGP5Ute9/IMG_20260212_110119.jpg) Then I mixed everything well with my hands. After mixing them well, I added a small amount to a safe. ![IMG_20260212_110137.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmZz7xziiBy7aXsnM5LDmdcspkrtUjYmCPMihLz5jMBp32/IMG_20260212_110137.jpg) I started making it with the others in this way. And at one point, I made many round safes with all of them. ![IMG_20260212_110204.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTGFmjW4ZPKm589j4oUXaVFEacMYGM28o9xCqAWJvei3q/IMG_20260212_110204.jpg) Then I took an egg in a bowl and broke it well. I mixed it well with the help of a spoon. Then I took the bread that I had blended and placed it next to the egg. ![IMG_20260212_110225.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmQCGRvpfjnkprhHkhipEfCQu4zhyX82tDShkFq9Mxnmx3/IMG_20260212_110225.jpg) Then I took a dough. Then I put it in the egg. I put the egg in it well. Then I took it in the bread. ![IMG_20260212_110238.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmeADLrufYFLnu3o29h499S3rVZaCwCLMB7zBzD73DNCby/IMG_20260212_110238.jpg) Then I put the whole thing in the bread well. And in this way, I dipped all the dough in the egg and put the bread powder in it. ![IMG_20260212_110256.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYAs4zpRvvxWfUqFYyZyuEeoSdS34FFK1VjuyUawFVraB/IMG_20260212_110256.jpg) Then I put some oil in a pan and put it on the stove and heated it. Then I fried them well in oil. And that's how I finished making the recipe. I hope everyone likes it. ![IMG_20260212_110311.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmVYSmEiizVejTobjjGZQN9wUtgQhkpysTvRMm12kjm1Gg/IMG_20260212_110311.jpg)

### Make a good Presentation of your recipe.

![1000069852.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmUV969mfDvVS9VLNhoszcsbXxirpizdYBt8jvHfxutoJy/1000069852.jpg) ![1000069855.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmYReUre8XgpUmfGGC2A1mgtEcY8ugEsNnY2ygjW4mVRmR/1000069855.jpg) ![1000069858.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQma2dGjmeabeBn7fVxtSER33prHBjhY8pMnJXR3iQ35NWX/1000069858.jpg) ![1000069861.jpg](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmf9tzHoZbs5VvkDT673kfchVwemsmjdobgcaxRBiU4SPG/1000069861.jpg) ### Have you tried boiled chicken recipes?? What recipe your family likes?. Yes, I have tried the boiled chicken recipe. And I think boiled chicken means something healthy. Which is quite good for health. I like eating chicken a lot. So I liked it a lot. My family likes all kinds of recipes made with chicken. But they all love to eat chicken curry the most. Because this recipe is mostly made at home. Due to which it is very popular with everyone. Everyone likes other recipes a lot. But everyone likes this recipe a lot. ### List the prices of the ingredients you buy for making the recipe.
